title: Develop and monitor a sustainable production plan
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Develop and monitor a sustainable production plan demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Identify goals for sustainable production plan

pcs.text: Determine goals of production plan for farm
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine goals of production plan for farm?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine goals of production plan for farm.

pcs.text: Identify and document physical, biological, social and financial resources of farm
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and document physical, biological, social and financial resources of farm?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and document physical, biological, social and financial resources of farm.

pcs.text: Identify and analyse values, expectations and goals of stakeholders
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and analyse values, expectations and goals of stakeholders?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and analyse values, expectations and goals of stakeholders.

pcs.text: Identify and document sustainability goals from industry data and organisational records
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and document sustainability goals from industry data and organisational records?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and document sustainability goals from industry data and organisational records.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Identify goals for sustainable production plan

elements.title: Research and evaluate available sustainable production systems

pcs.text: Research potential farming models and evaluate against identified goals and resources
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Research potential farming models and evaluate against identified goals and resources?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Research potential farming models and evaluate against identified goals and resources.

pcs.text: Research and evaluate applicable sustainable production systems for farm
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Research and evaluate applicable sustainable production systems for farm?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Research and evaluate applicable sustainable production systems for farm.

pcs.text: Identify a production system that complies with sustainability and farm management goals
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify a production system that complies with sustainability and farm management goals?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify a production system that complies with sustainability and farm management goals.

pcs.text: Compare elements of production system with existing farm processes and resources
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Compare elements of production system with existing farm processes and resources?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Compare elements of production system with existing farm processes and resources.

pcs.text: Assess system against farm goals and sustainability principles, and document findings
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess system against farm goals and sustainability principles, and document findings?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess system against farm goals and sustainability principles, and document findings.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Research and evaluate available sustainable production systems

elements.title: Develop a sustainable production plan

pcs.text: Specify modifications to existing farm processes and resources for chosen production system
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Specify modifications to existing farm processes and resources for chosen production system?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Specify modifications to existing farm processes and resources for chosen production system.

pcs.text: Identify and document optimal production targets
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and document optimal production targets?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and document optimal production targets.

pcs.text: Identify inputs and system design elements required to achieve the production targets
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify inputs and system design elements required to achieve the production targets?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify inputs and system design elements required to achieve the production targets.

pcs.text: Establish risk management strategies
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Establish risk management strategies?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Establish risk management strategies.

pcs.text: Identify record-keeping requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify record-keeping requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify record-keeping requirements.

pcs.text: Develop and document a sustainable production plan for selected enterprises and production systems
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Develop and document a sustainable production plan for selected enterprises and production systems?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Develop and document a sustainable production plan for selected enterprises and production systems.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Develop a sustainable production plan

elements.title: Monitor and evaluate effectiveness of the sustainable production systems

pcs.text: Establish farm system monitoring procedures and performance indicators
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Establish farm system monitoring procedures and performance indicators?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Establish farm system monitoring procedures and performance indicators.

pcs.text: Monitor performance indicators against production and sustainability targets
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor performance indicators against production and sustainability targets?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor performance indicators against production and sustainability targets.

pcs.text: Evaluate production and sustainability data against sustainable production plan goals
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Evaluate production and sustainability data against sustainable production plan goals?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Evaluate production and sustainability data against sustainable production plan goals.

pcs.text: Modify production system to resolve differences between planned and actual production targets
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Modify production system to resolve differences between planned and actual production targets?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Modify production system to resolve differences between planned and actual production targets.

pcs.text: Identify, monitor and assess environmental impact of farm production process
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify, monitor and assess environmental impact of farm production process?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify, monitor and assess environmental impact of farm production process.

pcs.text: Identify health and safety hazards, assess risk and implement controls for farm production
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify health and safety hazards, assess risk and implement controls for farm production?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify health and safety hazards, assess risk and implement controls for farm production.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Monitor and evaluate effectiveness of the sustainable production systems

elements.title: Record and manage information and data

pcs.text: Create and maintain records according to production plan, health and safety, and equipment programs
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Create and maintain records according to production plan, health and safety, and equipment programs?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Create and maintain records according to production plan, health and safety, and equipment programs.

pcs.text: Maintain record-keeping systems and data to enterprise and industry standards
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Maintain record-keeping systems and data to enterprise and industry standards?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Maintain record-keeping systems and data to enterprise and industry standards.

pcs.text: Prepare and assess recommendations for future sustainable production plans
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare and assess recommendations for future sustainable production plans?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare and assess recommendations for future sustainable production plans.

pcs.text: Document revised plans and record changes in organic management plan (OMP) according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Document revised plans and record changes in organic management plan (OMP) according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Document revised plans and record changes in organic management plan (OMP) according to workplace procedures.
